insight: A fast rush strategy of CCB/Tesla+E/Tesla+E/FFSEE (using Tesla Coil to pressure early) was identified as potentially beating BottyMcBotFace in a Tatsu Nullifier set by stopping the bot at 1 Tatsu, exploiting the bot's inability to respond to fast pressure.
author: jamberine
context: Jamberine analyzing an opening line against Tatsu Nullifier + Husk that might beat BottyMcBotFace.
